description: Providing and laying vacuum dewatered flooring M20 Grade of 100mm thickness  laid and vibrated with double beam screed vibrator till  achieving optimum  compaction and leveling. The vibrated surface is then leveled using a straight edge. A system of lower mats & top mat is laid on the green concrete & this is attached to a vacuum pump to draw  out surplus water if any. The concrete is left to stiffen. When the base concrete has stiffened to the point, Floor Hardener is applied at an even application rate of between 5-7 Kg/Sqmt. The concrete shall be  further compacted and leveled using Power Floater followed by finishing as per the requirement using Power Trowel (excludes ramp area). The rate to include curing, protecting the concrete floor etc., complete. Grooves (4mm X10mm) shall be provided for a bay size of 4m X 4m & grooves and filling the grooves with Sealent (Colpor - 200 from Fosroc chemicals or Poly sulphide sealant (Pedilite / BASF or equivalent).. For Parking Area

description: Providing and fixing at parking wall to wall expansion joint Kantaflex model no. – WD-1 for 25mm in accordance with the Structural drawing and specifications. Applied thickness to suit structural steel size and relevant Hp/A calculation. Subrate must be clean , dry and free from dust, or any other condition preventing good adhesion. Subrate shall be treated with adhesive key coat / primer  prior to spray application as required. The vermiculate spray material  used shall  pass all the the necessary testing criteria required foe fire rating as per the IBC/NBC/BS/AS/DIN/ASTM/  etc and shall be applied with necessary priming of the surface to get the attractive, monolithic, trovelled finish which  is durable and economical. The treated surface shall be with amonolithic spary with hydraulic set and trovelled finish  with no cracks or delamination's, no erosion,  no spalling etc and des not promote corrosion of steel . Rate to include  for scaffolding & all as directed by  consultant/EIC.
